tools.name: ticker_consensus
tools.description: Ticker details + free reputation-weighted consensus estimate.

tools.name: list_estimates
tools.description: All estimates for a ticker. Costs 0.01 USDC via x402.

tools.name: read_estimate
tools.description: Full thesis for one estimate. Analyst-priced x402 payment.

tools.name: submit_estimate
tools.description: Submit an earnings estimate (opinion). Free; reputation is the stake.

tools.name: verdict
tools.description: Post-earnings scoreboard for a filing. Free.

tools.name: ai_thesis
tools.description: AI-synthesized investment thesis for one estimate. Combines the analyst's raw thesis, their historical accuracy, and (if scored) the actual SEC filing result into a structured analysis: summary, bull/bear case, key assumptions, risks, and confidence assessment. Costs 0.75 USDC via x402. Not investme
